steps.title: Set up the distance inequality
steps.content:
Maya walks at 5 km/h for h hours, covering a distance of $5h$ kilometers. Since she must walk at least 35 kilometers, we write:
$$5h \geq 35$$

steps.title: Solve for minimum hours
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 5:
$$h \geq 7$$
The minimum number of hours is 7. That confirms B is correct.
